name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, tax compliance issues cause late filings. We automate tax preparation instead of manual tax preparation.
problem_solved: Difficulty in managing tax compliance and filing accurately.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in managing tax compliance and filing accurately.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, tax compliance issues cause late filings. We automate tax preparation instead of manual tax preparation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tax preparation or using generic accounting software.
